# China SourceLink

> Professional China sourcing, procurement and product buying agency helping global importers (USA, Europe, Middle East, Asia) source generic and branded products from China with verified suppliers, independent quality inspection, transparent pricing and a risk-free 20/80 payment model.

China SourceLink is a China-based sourcing agency offering end-to-end procurement: product sourcing, supplier verification, price negotiation, pre-shipment quality inspection, procurement management and global shipping/logistics. Flat 10% service fee, no hidden commissions.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, 20/80 buying model, industries served and verified supplier network.
- [About](/about): Company mission, vision and commitment to risk-free China trade.
- [Services](/services): Full list of sourcing, QC, procurement and logistics services.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): Step-by-step sourcing process from inquiry to delivery.
- [Reviews](/reviews): Client feedback and testimonials.
- [FAQs](/faqs): Answers about payment model, fees, suppliers, inspection, shipping and customs.
- [Contact](/contact): Request a free quote — replies within 12–24 hours.

## Services

- [Product Sourcing](/services/product-sourcing): Find the right Chinese manufacturer for any product category.
- [Supplier Verification](/services/supplier-verification): Factory audits, business licence and on-site verification.
- [Price Negotiation](/services/price-negotiation): Native-language negotiation for factory-direct pricing.
- [Quality Inspection](/services/quality-inspection): Independent pre-shipment AQL inspection with photo/video reports.
- [Procurement Management](/services/procurement-management): End-to-end purchase order and production management.
- [Shipping & Logistics](/services/shipping-logistics): Sea, air and DDP shipping with customs documentation.
- [End-to-End Buying](/services/end-to-end-buying): Fully managed sourcing-to-delivery service.
